description: UI/UX design tools, prototyping software, icon/illustration libraries, and design-to-code utilities.

entries.name: Figma
entries.summary: Collaborative interface design tool with prototyping, dev handoff, and a huge community plugin ecosystem.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 3 collaborative design files, unlimited personal files.

entries.name: Canva
entries.summary: Drag-and-drop design tool for social graphics, presentations, and marketing assets.
entries.freeTier: Free plan with thousands of templates and core editing tools.

entries.name: Penpot
entries.summary: Open-source design and prototyping platform, a self-hostable alternative to Figma built on open web standards (SVG).
entries.freeTier: Free cloud plan with generous limits; fully free self-hosted.

entries.name: Storybook
entries.summary: Open-source tool for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation.

entries.name: unDraw
entries.summary: Open-source illustration library with a consistent style, customizable colors, free for commercial use.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited free downloads, no attribution required.

entries.name: Heroicons
entries.summary: Free, MIT-licensed SVG icon set by the makers of Tailwind CSS, with solid and outline variants.

entries.name: Lucide
entries.summary: Community-maintained fork of Feather Icons with a much larger, actively growing icon set.

entries.name: Coolors
entries.summary: Fast color palette generator with export to CSS, image extraction, and accessibility checks.
entries.freeTier: Free palette generation, export, and basic exploration tools.

entries.name: Maze
entries.summary: Rapid user testing and product research platform that connects to Figma prototypes.
entries.freeTier: Free plan with limited monthly tests/responses.

entries.name: Excalidraw
entries.summary: Virtual whiteboard for sketching diagrams with a hand-drawn aesthetic, open source and browser-based.
entries.freeTier: Free to use in-browser, no account required; open-source self-hosting also free.
